assertions.description: U3 (ADM7154, an Analog Devices ultra-low noise LDO regulator from the ADM715x family) is present with VIN/VOUT/EN pins and 5 decoupling capacitors, but signal_analysis.power_regulators is empty []. The subcircuits section captures U3 as a neighbor-IC cluster but does not classify it as a linear regulator. The lib_id 'SIB_Footprint:ADM7514' and value 'ADM7154' both contain 'ADM7' which should be matchable. Correct output would include a power_regulator entry with regulator_type='linear', input_rail='+VIN', output_rail='+VOUT'.
